package rulefixtures

// scenario for inconsistent_package_name: Directories that mix base Go package names after ignoring the _test suffix.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: style; severity: info.
type Rule751NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario751Negative(records []Rule751NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
